title: centella pilosa
intro: Centella pilosa, also known as Asiatic pennywort, is a perennial plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Centella pilosa include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin and brain health. Centella pilosa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
